What we do

Nine integrated disciplines, one goal: make your brand impossible to ignore in Canada's competitive digital landscape.

Our Services

Everything your brand
needs to grow

05

Email Marketing

We create and manage email campaigns that nurture your audience and drive meaningful action. From newsletters to promotional blasts and automated workflows — our process includes writing, graphic design, and optimization to increase engagement, build relationships, and boost conversions.

Newsletter CampaignsPromotional BlastsAutomated WorkflowsCopywritingPerformance Optimization
01

Social Media Marketing

We manage your social media marketing efforts end-to-end — leveraging content creation, scheduling posts, engaging with your audience, and monitoring performance. Our team ensures your brand shows up consistently and professionally, driving real results.

From Instagram to TikTok to LinkedIn, we help you build a strong digital presence that converts followers into customers.

Content StrategyPost SchedulingCommunity ManagementAnalytics & ReportingInfluencer Collaboration
02

Digital Marketing

We build custom strategies rooted in data, creativity, and market insight. From funnel design to competitive analysis and customer journey mapping, we incorporate content creation, email marketing, graphic design, SEO, and social media marketing.

This comprehensive approach provides a clear roadmap to help your brand grow efficiently and sustainably across all digital channels.

Funnel DesignCompetitive AnalysisCustomer Journey MappingMulti-Channel StrategyGrowth Roadmap
03

Content Creation

Your content should look as good as your brand feels. We specialize in high-quality photos, videos, Reels, TikToks, and graphic design tailored to your audience and industry.

Every piece is thoughtfully curated to enhance engagement, strengthen brand identity, and effectively tell your story — optimized for social media and search performance.

Photography DirectionVideo ProductionReels & TikToksGraphic DesignBrand Storytelling
04

Graphic Designing

We create visuals that enhance your brand's identity and messaging with clarity and visual appeal. Our offerings include promotional graphics, social media layouts, menus, posters, and digital assets — all tailored for effective content creation and marketing campaigns.

Each design is customized to reflect your brand's personality and ensure consistency across all platforms.

Promotional GraphicsSocial Media LayoutsPosters & MenusDigital AssetsBrand Consistency
06

Search Engine Optimization

We help your business get found by the right audience. Through strategic keyword targeting, on-page optimization, and technical improvements, we enhance your search rankings while driving organic traffic that converts.

Our SEO-focused content creation, combined with social media strategies, boosts your visibility and ensures your brand stands out in competitive search results.

Keyword ResearchOn-Page OptimizationTechnical SEOOrganic Traffic GrowthSearch Rankings
07

Event Marketing

We plan, promote, and execute events that create lasting impressions. Whether it's a product launch, concert, corporate event, or community gathering — we handle the full marketing lifecycle from pre-event buzz to post-event content amplification.

Event StrategyPromotion CampaignsOn-site ExecutionContent CapturePost-Event Amplification
08

Web & App Development

We design and build high-performance websites and mobile applications that are fast, scalable, and built to convert. From brand new builds to full redesigns, our development team creates digital experiences that reflect your brand identity and drive measurable results.

Whether you need a sleek marketing site, a feature-rich e-commerce platform, or a custom mobile app for iOS and Android — we handle every stage from wireframe and UX design through to launch and ongoing support.

Website Design & DevelopmentMobile App DevelopmentE-CommerceUX/UI DesignMaintenance & Support
09

Experiential Marketing

We create immersive, social-first brand experiences that connect businesses directly with real consumers. Through live product testing, public reactions, creator-led storytelling, and street-style activations, Ninearc helps brands generate authentic engagement, viral-ready content, and valuable consumer insights.

Our experiential campaigns are designed to do more than create buzz — they build trust, increase visibility, and turn real-world interactions into high-performing digital assets across social media platforms. From product launches and sampling campaigns to branded activations and live audience engagement, we help brands create moments people remember and share.

Public Product TestingLive Consumer ReactionsStreet-Style Brand ActivationsUGC & Viral Content CreationConsumer Insights & FeedbackCreator-Led Campaigns
